description: Parallel test with dependencies: story 3 depends on stories 1 and 2

userStories.title: Add Multiply function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Multiply function in math.go
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Multiply(a, b int) int function to math.go that returns a * b
Add a doc comment for the function

userStories.title: Add Divide function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Divide function in math.go
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Divide(a, b int) (int, error) function to math.go that returns a / b
Return an error if b is 0
Add a doc comment for the function

userStories.title: Add tests for all math functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for all math functions including Multiply and Divide
acceptanceCriteria: Create math_test.go with tests for Add, Subtract, Multiply, and Divide
Test Divide with zero divisor returns error
